@kuratchi/js.description: Cloudflare Workers-native framework with file-based routing, server actions, inline template syntax, Durable Object RPC, Agents, and progressive enhancement

@kuratchi/orm.description: Workers-native ORM for Cloudflare D1 and Durable Object SQLite with schema DSL, query builder, migrations, and JSON column support

shared_config.kuratchi_config_ts: Declarative config for ORM, Auth, UI, and Durable Object integrations
shared_config.kuratchi_runtime_ts: Optional runtime middleware for agent routing and pre-route hooks
